news.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute, Palantir and Anduril join US State Department’s Freedom Tech Excellence Program
news.summary: The Bitcoin Policy Institute, Palantir and Anduril are partners in the U.S. State Department's Freedom Tech Excellence Program.

news.title: Stocks Just Topped Crypto on Hyperliquid. ARK Says That Changes Everything
news.summary: For the first time, real-world assets—stocks, commodities, and market indices—outpaced crypto on the world's biggest decentralized derivatives exchange.

news.title: EU authorities include HTX exchange in Russian sanctions
news.summary: The exchange, already sanctioned by the UK, is now on a list of 18 entities “providing crypto-assets services or payment services“ in defiance of the EU’s measures against Russia.

news.title: Strive’s SATA recovers most of June decline, trades within 3% of par
news.summary: Jan3 CEO Samson Mow says the recovery could signal renewed confidence in preferred-share products used by Bitcoin treasury companies.
